headline: Sofia steals the show while Alex and Vicki tread water
text: Sofia was the big winner, with Egypt beating New Zealand and giving her a tidy boost. The other result worth a cheer was the dead-heat between Uruguay and Cape Verde, which kept Sara and Vicki from going backwards. The damp squib was Belgium and Iran drawing blanks, so Vicki and Emily both missed a chance to climb. Overall, Max is still top dog on 11 points, with Grandad and Vicki snapping at his heels on 10. At the other end, Sofia and Chris are propping up the table on 4 points, with Sofia taking the latest hit.
